name: Tyorpitta (Cheese Pitta)
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the feta cheese into very small pieces.
2. Melt butter in a small pot.
3. Add flour and blend well.
4. Slowly add scalded milk, stirring constantly to make a smooth bechamel sauce.
5. Add a little salt and pepper. Remove from heat and stir until cool.
6. Add the crumbled cheese and mix well.
7. Add eggs and mix again.
8. Butter a pan about 2 inches smaller than the phyllo sheets.
9. Use more than half of the phyllo sheets to make the bottom layer of the pie. Brush each with melted butter and place them in the pan, letting the edges hang over the pan.
10. Pour in the cheese-egg mixture, spreading evenly.
11. Cover the mixture with phyllo that extends beyond the pan. This will prevent the mixture from leaking out.
12. Carefully cut remaining phyllo to fit the pan. Brush each sheet with butter before placing on the pitta.
13. Brush the top with butter and sprinkle with a little water.
14. Score into strips to make cutting the pie easier after it is baked.
15. Bake in a preheated 300°F oven for 45 minutes.
16. Cut into pieces and serve hot.
